= contains

Tests if an array or object contains a value

== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `value`
| `unknown`
| A value to test against elements of the target.

|===


== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.has_foo = this.thing.contains("foo")

# In:  {"thing":["this","foo","that"]}
# Out: {"has_foo":true}

# In:  {"thing":["this","bar","that"]}
# Out: {"has_foo":false}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.has_bar = this.thing.contains(20)

# In:  {"thing":[10.3,20.0,"huh",3]}
# Out: {"has_bar":true}

# In:  {"thing":[2,3,40,67]}
# Out: {"has_bar":false}
----

[,bloblang]
----
root.has_foo = this.thing.contains("foo")

# In:  {"thing":"this foo that"}
# Out: {"has_foo":true}

# In:  {"thing":"this bar that"}
# Out: {"has_foo":false}
----
